series_metadata.series_description: The W-2 FORMS contain the BWC employees annual earnings, taxes withheld, and other deductions. The W-2 FORMS are in paper and microfiche from 1979 to 2006.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: To be retained in Payroll for 7 years, and then destroy. ; Paper: To be retained in Payroll for 3 years, transfer to the records storage facility for 4 years, and then destroy., Microform: Burn ; Paper: Shred
